## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the underlying need, not just the desired feature.
"I want X" is harder to act on than "When I'm doing Y, Z gets in the way." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like KubeAtlas to do. Sketches, mockups, or example
output are very welcome. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

## Scope check

Please confirm the request is consistent with KubeAtlas's deliberate scope
(see `CONTRIBUTING.md`):

- [ ] It does not require built-in authentication or user accounts.
- [ ] It does not require multi-cluster fan-in.
- [ ] It is not a destructive cluster operation (drain, cordon, bulk delete).
- [ ] It does not require exposing KubeAtlas on a non-loopback interface.

If a box is unchecked, please explain why this case is worth the exception.
